info.title: Azents Admin API
info.description: Admin CRUD API server for Azents

get.description:
Return the server readiness status.

This is the endpoint for the Kubernetes readiness probe.

Return the server liveness status.

This is the endpoint for the Kubernetes liveness probe.
Return whether initial system bootstrap is available.

post.description: Create the first User and system administrator session.

get.description: Get an EmailVerification by email and CSRF token.
List active EmailVerification records by email.

post.description:
Emit a log at the specified level.

Used to verify Sentry delivery.
- WARNING: Sentry breadcrumb attached to the next event
- ERROR/CRITICAL: sent directly with ``sentry_sdk.capture_message()``

schema.default: Debug test log from admin API
schema.title: Message

post.description:
Raise an unhandled exception.

FastAPI returns 500 and sends an event with stacktrace to Sentry.

schema.default: Debug test exception from admin API
schema.title: Message

post.description: Refresh all system model catalog projections.
Refresh one system model catalog projection by provider.

patch.description: Update archive retention settings with optimistic concurrency.

post.description: Preview applying one retention value to existing archives.

put.description: Grant system administrator authority to an existing User.

delete.description: Revoke system administrator authority from a User.

get.description: List the redacted System Settings inventory.
Return the redacted Platform GitHub App detail.

patch.description: Patch the Admin base and validate the resulting candidate.

post.description: Retry external validation for the current candidate.
Confirm unchanged impact and activate a valid candidate.

delete.description: Cancel the current candidate and delete its ciphertext.

post.description: Run an explicit health check for the current effective setting.

get.description: List metadata-only System Settings audit events.
List UserEmail records by User ID.

delete.description:
Delete a WorkspaceUser.

Owners cannot be deleted. Transfer ownership first, then delete.

post.description:
Transfer Workspace ownership.

Set the new Owner and demote the previous Owner to Manager.

archived_session_retention_days.title: Archived Session Retention Days
archived_session_retention_days.description: Whole-day archive retention; null means Unlimited

ArchiveRetentionPreviewRequest.title: ArchiveRetentionPreviewRequest
ArchiveRetentionPreviewRequest.description: Proposed archive retention value for impact preview.

email.title: Email
email.description: Email to pin to the token

DebugExceptionResponse.title: DebugExceptionResponse
DebugExceptionResponse.description: Debug exception response. The actual response is 500.

archived_session_retention_days.title: Archived Session Retention Days
archived_session_retention_days.description: Whole-day archive retention; null means Unlimited

archived_session_retention_days.title: Archived Session Retention Days
archived_session_retention_days.description: Whole-day archive retention; null means Unlimited

FileLifecycleSettingsUpdateResponse.title: FileLifecycleSettingsUpdateResponse
FileLifecycleSettingsUpdateResponse.description: Updated settings and optional durable recalculation application.

PlatformGitHubAppBindingResponse.title: PlatformGitHubAppBindingResponse
PlatformGitHubAppBindingResponse.description: Redacted resources that require reconnect for the effective App.

PlatformGitHubAppConfirmRequest.title: PlatformGitHubAppConfirmRequest
PlatformGitHubAppConfirmRequest.description: Confirmation for an unchanged validated candidate impact.

PlatformGitHubAppDetailResponse.title: PlatformGitHubAppDetailResponse
PlatformGitHubAppDetailResponse.description: Redacted Platform GitHub App detail response.

PlatformGitHubAppPatchRequest.title: PlatformGitHubAppPatchRequest
PlatformGitHubAppPatchRequest.description: Optimistic partial update for the Platform GitHub App Admin base.

expires_in.title: Expires In
expires_in.description: Access token expiration time in seconds

SystemCatalogProvider.title: SystemCatalogProvider
SystemCatalogProvider.description: Provider with a system-owned model catalog.

SystemModelCatalogRefreshListResponse.title: SystemModelCatalogRefreshListResponse
SystemModelCatalogRefreshListResponse.description: System model catalog refresh list response.

SystemModelCatalogSyncAttemptResponse.title: SystemModelCatalogSyncAttemptResponse
SystemModelCatalogSyncAttemptResponse.description: Latest model catalog sync attempt response.

SystemSettingAuditEventListResponse.title: SystemSettingAuditEventListResponse
SystemSettingAuditEventListResponse.description: Paginated metadata-only System Settings audit events.

SystemSettingAuditEventType.title: SystemSettingAuditEventType
SystemSettingAuditEventType.description: Metadata-only System Settings audit event type.

SystemSettingAuditSource.title: SystemSettingAuditSource
SystemSettingAuditSource.description: Authority that produced a System Settings audit event.

SystemSettingSecretActionRequest.title: SystemSettingSecretActionRequest
SystemSettingSecretActionRequest.description: Explicit secret replacement or clearing action.

SystemSettingValidationStatus.title: SystemSettingValidationStatus
SystemSettingValidationStatus.description: Persisted candidate or activation validation state.
